data.current_description: Create or Override quotas. This endpoint will take an array of quotas and create quotas where the quota does not exist and update quotas where one exist. For example, if the request contains three quotas for Ethnicity, {White = 100, Asian = 100, and African-American = 100}, if these quotas don't exist, they will be created. If a subsequent call has four quotas {White = 75, Asian = 75, African-American = 75, and Hispanic = 75}, The White, Asian, and African-American quotas will be overriden to 75 each, and a new Hispanic quota will be added.
data.description_suggestion: Creates new quotas or updates existing quotas for the specified survey. Accepts an array of quota objects. This is an upsert operation - partial quota updates are supported by including only the quotas to be modified.

data.current_description: Create or Override quotas. This endpoint will take an array of quotas and create quotas where the quota does not exist and update quotas where one exist.
